expanded_mask_layout: index i=0 is first DDIM step (t=T-1); i=T-1 is t=0

block_identity_semantics.blocks[].id: scheduler-local index (stable within this scheduler JSON)

stage1_baseline_params.I_cut_formula: I_cut = (4/9)*I_l1cos + (5/9)*SVD; I_l1cos = 0.7*L1_norm + 0.3*Cos_norm (change magnitudes, not stability); interval columns mapped to reused DDIM t

cache_runtime_overrides.interpretation: Safety overrides apply only to cache diagnostic pass (runtime union). stage2_refined_scheduler_config.json masks are Stage2 refine results unless merged elsewhere.

snapshot_meta.expanded_mask_semantics: step_idx=0 is first denoise step; True=full compute
snapshot_meta.note: If runtime overrides are applied (e.g. force-full-prefix), k_per_zone may not reconstruct expanded_mask exactly.
